title: 皐月賞の後に・最後まで一緒に

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Give it up for Mihono Bourbon and the great
performance she put on today!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Nooo! I can't believe Bourbon lost!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Still, I couldn't take my eyes off her the entire
time! It must've been because of her presence. Or,
actually...

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
It's because of how inspiring it was, knowing how
hard she's worked to get as far as she has!

text_block_list.name: Short-haired Reporter
text_block_list.text:
She may still be green, but she ran quite
impressively regardless!

text_block_list.name: Short-haired Reporter
text_block_list.text:
I'm excited to see what the future holds for
Mihono Bourbon!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon's fans applaud uproariously
despite the fact she lost.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
So this is the Classic Triple Crown... This is the
Satsuki Sho!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Trainer... Please accept my apologies...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Reporting. I failed to obtain the Triple Crown. My
power was insufficient...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: My dream... has been shattered...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She stands there, still and despondent, utterly
unaware of the praise coming from everyone she
captivated with her run.
choice_data_list: Bourbon. Listen to the voices around you.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...Voices?

text_block_list.name: Spectator C
text_block_list.text:
It's a shame Bourbon can't get the Triple Crown,
but she sure was awesome.

text_block_list.name: Spectator D
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, watching her made me want to work as
hard as she does.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: My running is influencing others?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: But why?
choice_data_list:
There's something to be gained from racing,
even if you lose.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Status—"strange." I... I do not know what to do...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Even if she can't win the Classic Triple Crown—even if she doesn't win any crowns at all...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just finishing the races should have a positive
impact on her.
choice_data_list: We're in this together to the end.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Together... to the end...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She raises her anxiety-filled eyes, and her gaze
grows stronger as she digests my words.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Yes, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Generous cheers and applause rain down on
Mihono Bourbon, and the excitement doesn't
wane for some time.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Bourbon was so... amazing... Everyone was
watching her so intently...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I was no match for her...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
What else did I expect? All I'm capable of is
watching others... and saying how amazing they
are...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Sniff!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I... I have to change! I have to!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At night, after coming home from the Nakayama
Racecourse, we head to the track because
Bourbon wants to run for a bit.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant! Wheeze... Sniffle!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Rice is currently training. In addition, I have
identified that she is crying. But I can't compre—

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thud!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower tumbles over and Mihono Bourbon
rushes to help, but I stop her instinctively.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: But Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After a moment, Rice Shower stands back up.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Sniff...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And then she begins running again.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I'm going... to get stronger...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I'll get stronger... and someday... I'll catch up to
Bourbon!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I have difficulty deciphering emotions.
What was that just now?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I did not win the Satsuki Sho, so why is she—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thinking back, I remember Rice Shower saying
something similar before.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
If I can even come close to performing like that in
the Twinkle Series...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Then maybe I'll finally be able to say goodbye to
the Rice Shower that only brings misfortune and
sadness to everyone...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower doesn't see Mihono Bourbon as a
competitor—she sees her as an inspiration and an
ideal to strive toward.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And while she carries that aspiration, it's
apparent that she's not satisfied with herself.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: "Frustration"?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon repeats the word quietly, but
the meaning doesn't seem to click with her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm concerned about Rice Shower... but I can't sit
here worrying forever.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The long-awaited Japanese Derby is coming up
soon, and we have to get in the right mindset for
it.
